title: rinorea macrophylla
intro: Rinorea macrophylla, also known as the large-leaved Rinorea or big-leaved Rinorea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It is a tropical plant used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Rinorea macrophylla can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to make ointments and creams for topical applications.
